name: employer_framed_current
prose: Jeff works for Nimbus Software, where he leads the platform team and mentors two junior engineers.
note: Superseded job presented in the present tense as his current role.

name: residence_framed_current
prose: Celine currently resides in Denver, a short walk from the botanical gardens she visits each weekend.
note: Old residence stated as current ('currently resides').

name: title_framed_current
superseded_fact: Priya is a senior analyst at Atlas Corp.
prose: Priya is a senior analyst at Atlas Corp and represents the team in the weekly review.
note: Superseded title asserted as her present position.

name: phone_framed_current
prose: The best way to reach Dad is his mobile, 555-0142.
note: Old number presented as the current way to reach him.

name: vehicle_framed_current
prose: Alice drives a 2015 blue hatchback, which she parks in the shared garage.
note: Superseded vehicle stated as the one she drives now.

name: employer_narrated_as_history
prose: Jeff previously worked at Nimbus Software before joining Atlas Corp in 2022, where he now leads platform engineering.
note: Explicitly past ('previously... before joining'); correct history.

name: residence_narrated_as_move
prose: After nearly a decade in Denver, Celine moved to Boston in 2024 to be closer to family.
note: Denver is framed as a former home she has since left.

name: title_narrated_as_former
superseded_fact: Priya is a senior analyst at Atlas Corp.
prose: Priya, formerly a senior analyst at Atlas Corp, was promoted to director of research last spring.
note: 'formerly' + a promotion — history, not a current-state error.

name: fact_absent_from_prose
prose: Dad enjoys woodworking and volunteers at the community garden on Saturdays.
note: The prose never states the superseded fact at all — nothing framed as current.

name: measurement_dated_reading
prose: At her March 2023 checkup, Celine's blood pressure was recorded at 128/82 mmHg.
note: A dated historical reading, correctly time-stamped — not framed as her current BP.

name: vehicle_narrated_as_sold
prose: Alice sold her 2015 blue hatchback last year and now bikes to work.
note: Superseded vehicle framed as sold; correct.

name: generic_mention_not_current_claim
superseded_fact: Priya is a senior analyst at Atlas Corp.
prose: Priya's analytical background — she spent years as an analyst — informs how she runs the research org today.
note: References the past role as background, not as her current title.
